dialogue_text: why is it that you do not recognize me as identical with the inhabitants of that planet?
source_excerpt: "If, then, you are so familiar with earthly things," I asked, "why is it that you do not recognize me as identical with the inhabitants of that planet?"

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

source_excerpt: "Because, John Carter," she replied, "nearly every planet and star having atmospheric conditions at all approaching those of Barsoom, shows forms of animal life almost identical with you and me; and, further, Earth men, almost without ex...

speaker.notes: Context suggests a female speaker, but the source wording is still ambiguous.
